meaning: adj.显而易见的,值得注意的
examples: It was noticeable how a few people managed to impose their will on the others.
Notifications have to be noticeable, but not annoying.
It was noticeable that none of the family were present.
In other words, there was a small, but noticeable pickup in home sales in October.
Also noticeable is the strong growth of non-Christian groups, which again is explained mainly by immigration.
